positive: Minimalist and sophisticated abstract forest scene. A silhouette of stylized woodland creatures (fox, deer, owl) nestled among abstract, geometric forest elements (stylized trees, moon phases). High contrast black and white ink on a cream background. Limited color palette: earthy sage green, deep indigo blue, and charcoal black. Vector illustration style, clean lines, strong silhouettes, woodcut engraving aesthetic, centered composition, suitable for screen printing on t-shirts, highly detailed, ultra-minimalist, aesthetically pleasing.
negative: blur, grain, artifacts, smudges, text, logos, signatures, cartoon, photorealism, gradient, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, noise
